# The Breakup Therapist

> Rose Andre's private therapy practice in Murray, Utah, specializing in breakup and divorce recovery, IFS (Internal Family Systems) therapy, anxious attachment, grief and loss, and LGBTQ+ affirming relationship therapy. Sessions available in-person in Murray, Utah or virtually anywhere in the state.

## Pages
- [Home](https://www.the-breakup-therapist.com/): Overview, validation of the breakup/divorce experience, services summary, insurance and location info.
- [About & Approach](https://www.the-breakup-therapist.com/about.html): Rose Andre's background and the IFS (parts-work) lens on why relationship endings are so painful.
- [Services](https://www.the-breakup-therapist.com/services.html): Individual breakup/divorce therapy, IFS therapy, anxious attachment work, grief and loss therapy, LGBTQ+ affirming therapy, and the upcoming Regulation Library.
  - [Breakup & Divorce Recovery](https://www.the-breakup-therapist.com/service-breakup-divorce-recovery.html)
  - [IFS Therapy](https://www.the-breakup-therapist.com/service-ifs-therapy.html)
  - [Anxious Attachment & Relationship Patterns](https://www.the-breakup-therapist.com/service-anxious-attachment.html)
  - [Grief & Loss Therapy](https://www.the-breakup-therapist.com/service-grief-loss.html)
  - [LGBTQ+ Affirming Therapy](https://www.the-breakup-therapist.com/service-lgbtq-affirming.html)
- [Find A Therapist For You](https://www.the-breakup-therapist.com/find-a-therapist.html): Rose Andre's therapy matchmaker service — a one-hour consultation followed by three tailored therapist recommendations (with a second round and money-back guarantee if no match is found). $100 flat, open to the public, not limited to Rose's own therapy clients. Includes an explainer video.
- [Blog](https://www.the-breakup-therapist.com/blog.html): 40 articles on breakup and divorce recovery, IFS therapy, anxious attachment, grief and loss, LGBTQ+ affirming therapy, and practical/local topics for Murray and the greater Salt Lake City area.
  - IFS Therapy:
    - [What Is IFS Therapy? A Beginner's Guide to Healing After Heartbreak](https://www.the-breakup-therapist.com/blog-what-is-ifs-therapy-beginners-guide.html)
    - [Meet Your Parts: Why You Can't Stop Checking Their Instagram](https://www.the-breakup-therapist.com/blog-ifs-parts-checking-ex-social-media.html)
    - [The Anxious Part, the Angry Part, and the Numb Part: Understanding Your Post-Breakup Self](https://www.the-breakup-therapist.com/blog-anxious-angry-numb-parts-breakup.html)
    - [Why "Just Get Over It" Doesn't Work (An IFS Perspective)](https://www.the-breakup-therapist.com/blog-just-get-over-it-ifs-perspective.html)
    - [How IFS Therapy Helps You Stop Repeating the Same Relationship Pattern](https://www.the-breakup-therapist.com/blog-ifs-stop-repeating-relationship-pattern.html)
    - [Self-Leadership After Heartbreak: The IFS Path Beyond Coping Skills](https://www.the-breakup-therapist.com/blog-self-leadership-after-heartbreak-ifs.html)
  - Anxious Attachment:
    - [Anxious Attachment 101: Why You Overanalyze Every Text](https://www.the-breakup-therapist.com/blog-anxious-attachment-101-overanalyzing-texts.html)
    - [Do You Have an Anxious Attachment Style? Signs to Look For After a Breakup](https://www.the-breakup-therapist.com/blog-signs-anxious-attachment-style-breakup.html)
    - [How to Stop Chasing Reassurance After a Relationship Ends](https://www.the-breakup-therapist.com/blog-stop-chasing-reassurance-after-breakup.html)
    - [Breaking the Anxious-Avoidant Cycle](https://www.the-breakup-therapist.com/blog-anxious-avoidant-cycle-breaking.html)
    - [Why Anxious Attachment Makes Breakups Hurt So Much More](https://www.the-breakup-therapist.com/blog-anxious-attachment-breakups-hurt-more.html)
  - Grief & Loss:
    - [Why Breakup Grief Doesn't Follow the Five Stages](https://www.the-breakup-therapist.com/blog-breakup-grief-five-stages-myth.html)
    - [Grieving a Relationship That Wasn't "That Serious"](https://www.the-breakup-therapist.com/blog-grieving-relationship-not-that-serious.html)
    - [How to Grieve a Breakup When Everyone Says You're Better Off](https://www.the-breakup-therapist.com/blog-grieve-breakup-better-off-reaction.html)
    - [The Anniversary Effect: Why Breakup Grief Resurfaces Months Later](https://www.the-breakup-therapist.com/blog-anniversary-effect-breakup-grief.html)
    - [The Difference Between Grieving a Breakup and Grieving a Death](https://www.the-breakup-therapist.com/blog-grieving-breakup-vs-death-difference.html)
    - [How to Know If You Need Grief Therapy After a Breakup](https://www.the-breakup-therapist.com/blog-need-grief-therapy-after-breakup-signs.html)
  - Divorce:
    - [Divorce Recovery in Utah: What No One Tells You About Starting Over](https://www.the-breakup-therapist.com/blog-divorce-recovery-utah-starting-over.html)
    - [Co-Parenting After Divorce: Protecting Your Nervous System](https://www.the-breakup-therapist.com/blog-co-parenting-divorce-nervous-system.html)
    - [Rebuilding Your Identity After Divorce (Beyond "Who Gets the House")](https://www.the-breakup-therapist.com/blog-rebuilding-identity-after-divorce.html)

    - [The First 90 Days After Divorce: A Therapist's Roadmap](https://www.the-breakup-therapist.com/blog-first-90-days-after-divorce.html)
  - LGBTQ+:
    - [LGBTQ+ Affirming Therapy in Utah: What It Actually Means](https://www.the-breakup-therapist.com/blog-lgbtq-affirming-therapy-utah.html)
    - [Queer Breakups and Community: When Your Ex Is Still in Your Friend Group](https://www.the-breakup-therapist.com/blog-queer-breakup-shared-friend-group.html)
    - [Navigating a Breakup Without Family Support](https://www.the-breakup-therapist.com/blog-breakup-without-family-support.html)
  - Local & Practical:
    - [How to Find the Right Therapist in Murray, UT (Without Guessing)](https://www.the-breakup-therapist.com/blog-find-right-therapist-murray-utah.html)
    - [How to Handle Seeing Your Ex Around Salt Lake City After a Breakup](https://www.the-breakup-therapist.com/blog-seeing-your-ex-salt-lake-city.html)
    - [Insurance and Therapy in Utah: What Select Health, United, and EMI Actually Cover](https://www.the-breakup-therapist.com/blog-insurance-therapy-utah-coverage.html)
    - [Virtual vs. In-Person Therapy After a Breakup: What Works Best in Utah](https://www.the-breakup-therapist.com/blog-virtual-vs-in-person-therapy-utah.html)
    - [Winter Breakups in Utah: Why the Dark Months Make Heartbreak Harder](https://www.the-breakup-therapist.com/blog-winter-breakups-utah-seasonal.html)
    - [Starting Over in the Salt Lake Valley: Building a Life After Divorce or Breakup](https://www.the-breakup-therapist.com/blog-starting-over-salt-lake-valley.html)
    - [Therapy Directories vs. Personal Referrals: Why Fit Matters More Than Credentials](https://www.the-breakup-therapist.com/blog-therapy-directories-vs-personal-referrals.html)
  - Breakup Psychology:
    - [How Long Does It Take to Get Over a Breakup? A Therapist's Honest Answer](https://www.the-breakup-therapist.com/blog-how-long-to-get-over-a-breakup.html)
    - [Why You Keep Replaying the Relationship in Your Head](https://www.the-breakup-therapist.com/blog-why-you-keep-replaying-the-relationship.html)
    - [The Physical Symptoms of Heartbreak (And Why They're Real)](https://www.the-breakup-therapist.com/blog-physical-symptoms-of-heartbreak.html)
    - [Should You Stay Friends With Your Ex? A Therapist's Take](https://www.the-breakup-therapist.com/blog-should-you-stay-friends-with-your-ex.html)
    - [Dating Again After a Breakup: How to Know You're Actually Ready](https://www.the-breakup-therapist.com/blog-dating-again-after-breakup-ready.html)
    - [Why Breakup Advice From Friends Sometimes Makes It Worse](https://www.the-breakup-therapist.com/blog-breakup-advice-from-friends-backfires.html)
    - [The Difference Between Healthy Space and Avoidance After a Breakup](https://www.the-breakup-therapist.com/blog-healthy-space-vs-avoidance-breakup.html)
    - [What to Expect in Your First Breakup Therapy Session](https://www.the-breakup-therapist.com/blog-first-breakup-therapy-session-expect.html)
- [Contact](https://www.the-breakup-therapist.com/contact.html): Office address, phone, email, contact form, and FAQs.

## Key facts
- Insurance accepted: Select Health, United Healthcare, EMI. Private pay also available.
- Location: 4885 S 900 E, Suite 307, Murray, UT 84117. Virtual sessions available throughout Utah.
- Primary modality: Internal Family Systems (IFS) therapy.
- Therapy Matchmaker service: $100 flat fee, up to six personalized therapist recommendations across two rounds, money-back guarantee if no match is found.
